title: Using Vinyl with the Silhouette
excerpt: It's that time again - Silhouette has a fun promotion and giveaway for you.I've played with the vinyl before - you can check out how I decorated my mom's mini iPad and a little box here . This time I…
body:
It's that time again - Silhouette has a fun promotion and giveaway for you.I've played with the vinyl before - you can check out how I decorated my mom's mini iPad and a little box here.

This time I decided to use the white vinyl with intention to put the cut piece directly onto the freshly painted grey wall in my new studio. But when I looked closer, the wall actually isn't completely flat. My studio is being set up in the bonus room of the new house, which is behind the garage. It's something that was built as an addition, so there are some quirks. So I had to go with a different plan. But I knew I absolutely had to use this awesome Studio Calico cut design by the fabulous Kal Barteski.

I am still working out of the old place, which has carpet (our new place doesn't, and I am pretty thrilled about that for more reasons than just my allergies). Here's how the piece turned out:

I took it over to the new place at night and hung it straight up. It's the first piece to be nailed into the wall, and I LOVE it. Now I'm just deciding what pieces of Kal's I am going to order for the baby's room and studio, especially since she just updated her shop.

Visit Silhouette and use the promo code: TANGERINE through August 14 to get any of these: (1) Silhouette CAMEO®, 2 rolls of vinyl (chalkboard and white) and 1 roll of transfer paper: $269.99 (2) Buy one get one free deals on all Silhouette vinyl

These are some great products! Please click here to take advantage of this month’s discount and don’t forget to enter TANGERINE as the promo code valid through August 14.

Now for the really fun part... Silhouette wants to give one of you - my dear readers - a Silhouette CAMEO®! GIVEAWAY: To enter: Leave a comment with a favorite quote or something you love about your home. Open to US residents only. (Sorry internationals!) Giveaway will close on Monday, August 12th at 5am and a random winner will be selected and announced here shortly after. Good luck everyone!

GIVEAWAY IS NOW CLOSED. Really enjoyed all your comments about home! The winner is #37 - Amanda Rose says: August 7, 2013 at 11:56 am

OMG! I don’t WANT to win, I NEED to win! What I love about my home is my pink office/craftroom space in the basement (where I have the perfect spot for a CAMEO) {{wink wink}}. One of favorite quotes is “People often say that motivation doesn’t last. Well, neither does bathing, that’s why we recommend it daily.” — Zig Ziglar

CONGRATS!

Remember, everyone can take advantage of the deal through August 14, which now includes a Portrait option for $129.99 with the promo code TANGERINE. Shop here.
